de.uka.ilkd.key.java.visitor

Class JavaASTVisitor

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.visitor.JavaASTWalker
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.visitor.JavaASTVisitor
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Visitor
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    ContainsAssignmentCondition.ContainsAssignment, CreatingASTVisitor, DeclarationProgramVariableCollector, FinishSymbolicExecutionUntilJoinPointMacro.FilterSymbexStrategy.FindBreakVisitor, LabelCollector, MiscTools.ReadPVCollector, MiscTools.WrittenPVCollector, OuterBreakContinueAndReturnCollector, OuterBreakContinueAndReturnReplacer, ProgramVariableCollector, SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder.MethodFrameCounterJavaASTVisitor, SymbolicExecutionUtil.ContainsStatementVisitor, WhileLoopTransformation

    public abstract class JavaASTVisitor
extends JavaASTWalker
implements Visitor
    Extends the JavaASTWalker to use the visitor mechanism. The methods inherited by the Visitor interface are all implemented that they call the method doDefaultAction(ProgramElement) .

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      protected Services services

      • walk

        protected void walk(ProgramElement node)
        Description copied from class: JavaASTWalker
